project.title: Opening - franquicia becaria_corp (introduccion de personaje, Parte 1)
project.render_notes: OPENING = INTRODUCCION DEL PERSONAJE de la Parte 1 (8 escenas, ~35s): flex/gancho, disfraz, competencia secreta, origen, tragedia, por que se esconde, deseo humilde, transicion a la gala. Calcado sobre el opening real de la referencia (~232 wpm). VELOCIDAD: voice_speed 1.3 (Fish prosody.speed, SIN cambiar pitch) + voice_rate 1.0 (sin playbackRate). Las etiquetas cinematicas frenan la diccion, por eso la base va a 1.3. Grok 6s -> voz ~4-5s (techo 5.5s). SIN dialogo, SIN lip-sync (boca cerrada). Planos MEDIOS, cara anclada. OPENING OPCIONAL: este bloque va SOLO en la Parte 1 (y estrenos/especiales); en Partes 2,3,... se OMITE por completo.

pipeline.tts: Fish Audio (es neutro). 1 voz a prosody.speed=voice_speed. Mide con ffprobe; si pasa de 5.5s, recorta palabras.
pipeline.edit: FFmpeg + Remotion. La voz manda la duracion; el clip de 6s se acelera levemente.
pipeline.consistency_rule: Flow usa la reference_asset via el '+' ('the provided Seo-ah'). Grok anima la imagen de Flow. Plano MEDIO.

seo_ah.locked_description: East-Asian woman, late 20s, calm and intelligent. Long straight dark-brown hair, soft natural makeup. WARDROBE (fixed): neutral taupe/cream tailored blazer over a white silk blouse, thin delicate silver necklace, small pearl earrings. Composed, quietly elegant, a little weary.

ingredients.generation_prompt: EMPTY modern open-plan corporate office, bright daylight through floor-to-ceiling glass, grey desks, monitors, glass partitions, neutral palette, faint city view. Clean, glossy. No people. 9:16 vertical, no text.
EMPTY single office cubicle desk with a laptop, a small lamp, neatly stacked documents, a thin glass partition behind. Soft daylight, shallow depth. No people. 9:16 vertical, no text.
EMPTY narrow cozy small-apartment entryway hallway at night, warm amber light, a shoe cabinet, a few homely details, slightly cramped. Intimate, photoreal. No people. 9:16 vertical, no text.
A chubby orange-and-white domestic tabby cat named Mochi, round amber eyes, plush fur, adorable slightly grumpy expression. Photoreal, soft warm indoor light. 9:16 vertical, no text.

EMPTY elegant corporate annual gala ballroom at night: round banquet tables with white linen, soft golden hanging lights, deep blue stage uplighting and warm bokeh, polished reflective floor. Cinematic, glossy, atmospheric. No people. 9:16 vertical, no text.

visual.image_prompt: Using the provided Seo-ah on the provided plate_office: cinematic MEDIUM shot, Seo-ah from the chest up, at a modest desk among rows of identical desks, slowly lifting her eyes from her screen toward camera with a calm, knowing, quietly confident expression. A bright modern open-plan office with glass partitions and soft daylight, anonymous blurred adult coworkers far behind. IMPORTANT: keep her exact face, long dark hair and neutral taupe blazer over white blouse from the provided card; do not alter her face. Photoreal cinematic Korean-drama style, glossy, shallow depth of field, soft key light on her face, sharp facial detail, 9:16 vertical, no text, only adults no minors.
visual.animation_prompt: KEY ACTION (first 2s): Seo-ah lifts her eyes from the screen toward camera with a quiet, knowing look. CONTINUED (2-6s): subtle breathing, a slow confident blink, faint background office movement, soft light shift. She is NOT speaking (narration / voiceover) - keep her mouth softly closed, no lip movement. Keep the provided Seo-ah EXACTLY as provided, especially her face. Slow, composed motion filling the full 6s clip.

voiceover.text: [low, intriguing, knowing, cinematic narrator tone] Hablo el idioma del dinero mejor que nadie en esta empresa. Y aun así, nadie sabe quién soy.
voiceover.speaker: narrador

voiceover.text: En mi currículum solo escribí 'analista junior'. Para todos, soy la becaria que trae el café.
voiceover.speaker: narrador

voiceover.text: Cada día corrijo en silencio los errores que otros firman. Y dejo que ellos se lleven el mérito.

voiceover.text: Mi padre levantó esta empresa de la nada. Crecí entre sus libros de cuentas, leyendo el dinero.

voiceover.text: [low, tense, quietly foreboding, with a held final pause] Así viví, invisible, cada día... Hasta la noche de la gala anual.

captions.text: Hasta la noche de la gala.

capcut_export.caption_style: Blanco limpio, centrado-abajo, sombra suave; palabra 'hot' en dorado. SIN caja amarilla, SIN cartel negro.
capcut_export.music_notes: El preset novela-coreana va sin musica.

audio.note: voice_speed 1.3 = Fish habla mas rapido SIN cambiar pitch (regenera mp3). voice_rate 1.0 = sin playbackRate (sin subir tono). Preset SIN musica. Voz ~4-5s/escena, techo 5.5s.

tts_export.note: Genera op_01..op_08 (mp3+words.json) en public/_openings/becaria_corp/voice/ a prosody.speed=1.3. Una sola voz.
